name: Baked French Toast
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups evaporated skim milk (from one 12-ounce can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly coat a 9-by-13-by-2-inch pan with non-stick vegetable spray.
2. Arrange the bread slices in the bottom of the pan.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together all remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the bread slices.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
7. Remove the bread from the refrigerator and lightly spray with non-stick vegetable spray.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Serve with hot maple syrup, powdered sugar, and cinnamon.
